topics: various disciplines of ergonomics- industrial ergonomics
visual ergonomics and organizational ergonomics. Human Technological System (HTS): Concept and classifications
symbols and codes in design of visual displays
design of hand tools and devices
mechanics of upper extremity of hand
noise and vibration in design of workplaces
design of virtual environments and applications
safety and security aspects in workplaces
assessment of risks in workplaces. Suggestion on Project Topics: Each student team can choose some simple close to real life projects from the areas discussed in the syllabus

such as ● Workplace design with digital human modelling software ● Design of thermal environment with software support ● Physiological measurement with heart rate monitor ● Anthropometric data collection of different demographic segments
